goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should be in the type of 'boat'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 4
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel and should be in the type of boat
Make sure you get address and entrance fee
